mapper.sql: id, title, excerpt, tag, topic_id, content, record_date, images_json, view_count, pinned, status, owner_only, agent_reply, agent_reply_status, agent_reply_job_id

where.if: AND (LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(excerpt) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%'))

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY pinned DESC,
record_date ASC title ASC record_date DESC
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notes WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notes WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}

SELECT tag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM notes
AND status = #{status}
AND owner_only = 0
GROUP BY tag ORDER BY count DESC, tag ASC

SELECT LEFT(record_date, 7) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM notes
AND status = #{status}
AND owner_only = 0
AND record_date IS NOT NULL AND record_date != ''
GROUP BY LEFT(record_date, 7) ORDER BY month DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notes (id, title, excerpt, tag, topic_id, content, record_date, images_json, view_count, pinned, status, owner_only, agent_reply) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{excerpt}, #{tag}, #{topicId}, #{content}, #{date}, #{imagesJson}, 0, 0, #{status}, #{ownerOnly}, #{agentReply})
mapper.update: UPDATE notes SET title = #{title}, excerpt = #{excerpt}, tag = #{tag}, topic_id = #{topicId}, content = #{content}, record_date = #{date}, images_json = #{imagesJson}, status = #{status}, owner_only = #{ownerOnly} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notes SET agent_reply = #{agentReply} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notes SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notes SET view_count = view_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT view_count FROM notes WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE notes SET pinned = #{pinned} WHERE id = #{id}
